meta.question: Show the trace from "High singal exposures" to the analyses that verify it.
meta.finalAnswer:
Trace from "High signal exposures" to analyses that verify it:

**Requirement Found:**
- Name: "High signal exposures"
- Type: tmt%20requirement
- Location: TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System::Systems Engineering::01 Components::Operational::APS::Black Box Specification::Requirements::04 APS L3 Requirements::L3 APT Requirements

**Trace Relationship:**
The "High signal exposures" requirement has a dependency relationship to:
- "APS Acquisition Camera sensitivity" (a hierarchyelement)

**Verification Analysis:**
No explicit verification relationships (verify/satisfy dependencies) from analysis elements to "High signal exposures" were found in the model. The requirement traces to a parent requirement "APS Acquisition Camera sensitivity" but there are no analysis elements in the model that directly verify this specific requirement.

events.output: I'll help you trace from "High signal exposures" to the analyses that verify it. Let me start by exploring the model to find this element.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("High signal exposures"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("signal"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "High%20signal%20exposures" . 
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?target ?targetName ?depType WHERE {
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name "High%20signal%20exposures" .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_clientDependency ?dep .
  ?dep vocab:Dependency_supplier ?target .
  ?target vocab:NamedElement_name ?targetName .
  OPTIONAL { ?dep rdf:type ?depType }
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>

SELECT ?target ?targetName ?depType WHERE {

  ?req vocab:Element__directedRelationshipOfSource ?dep .
  ?dep vocab:Dependency_supplier ?target .
  ?target vocab:NamedElement_name ?targetName .
  OPTIONAL { ?dep rdf:type ?depType }
}
LIMIT 25

SELECT ?client ?clientName ?depType WHERE {

}

}
